item.title: USB Restore Apps [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Restore Apps [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
USB Restore Apps
(Utilities)
www.usbrestore.com offers complete solution to restore missing songs from digital music player in minimum time. USB Restore application provides perfect solution to quickly retrieve mistakenly delete video clip, songs and other common files in very short period of time. IPod data restore software gives attractive GUI interface for all system user to retrieve their corrupted mp3 songs at any time. USB iPod data recovery program rescue all user favorite songs and other mp3 files in minimum interval of time. Professional iPod data recovery tool instantly retrieve misplaced items or damage multimedia songs as well as video clips from audio player. USB Restore tool is effectual to get back all accidentally lost images or other valuable files in minimum time. IPod data restore tool recovers mistakenly deleted audio books, video files, graphic files, documents in least interval of time. IPod video restore tool is beneficial for those users who suffer from accidentally deletion or mistakenly lost corrupted files. IPod file repair tool provide easiest and fastest mode to recover all common picture files, sound tracks, video clips in few click of mouse button. USB Restore program provide comprehensive, cost-economical and flexible mode to instant retrieve viruses corrupted or worm infected music files.Features:-* Software instantly recovers deleted audio playlist, mp3 music songs, video clips or other similar data in very short time.* USB Restore program provide fast and comprehensive recovery solution for those user who suffer from mistakenly erased mp3 audio files.* Software

[read more]

item.title: Files Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecove
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recovery Mac
(Utilities)
Files Recovery Mac program enable users to efficiently salvage entire missed or unintentionally deleted priceless audio video albums, sound clippings, memorable digital pictures, still images, snapshots and other data for inaccessible digital camera.
[read more]

item.title: Lost Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Lost Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecove
item.itunes:summary:
Lost Files Mac
(Utilities)
Lost Files Mac tool is fully competent to retrieve your entire vanished data including your official files, excel spread sheets, audios/videos clippings, pictures, favorite songs collections images and other valuable data from various kinds of USB storage media. Lost Files Mac program facilitates you to recuperate your missing data from diverse types of USB drives. Lost Files Mac offers fast recovery of text and picture files at cheap price.
[read more]

item.title: File Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: File Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrestore
item.itunes:summary:
File Restore
(Utilities)
001Micron (Premium) – Data Recovery application facilitates users to efficiently regain overall erased valuable data stored in form of text documents, presentation files, excel spread sheets, video clippings, memorable pictures, still images, snapshots, digital photographs, favorite songs collection and many others. www.filesrestore.com enable users to regain missed data lost due to any crucial reason including formatted or reformatted hard disk drive, virus corruption, software malfunctioning and various others. File Restore software offer users to save missed or deleted memorable picture or images at user specified location in computer system or laptop for further reference. Graphical user interface facilitates users to friendly work with www.filesrestore.com without taking any technical training or professionally expert guidance for executing. Application offer users with sophisticated feature to prominently recover all misplaced data from all commonly used removable data storage device including pen drive, zip drive, thumb drive, external hard disk drive, digital camera, memory card, flash drives, memory stick, USB drives, mp3 or mp4 players, mobile phones, key drives and other similar devices. Easy to use File restore software offers facility of lost data preview before actual recovery for restoring missed and formatted essential files such as snaps, text documents, songs etc from any type USB drives according user need in simple countable steps. Features: * File Restore program facilitates users to easily retrieve overall erased memorable image or precious data in minimum span of time from removable storage drives. * Data retrieval utility efficiently salvages entire misplaced valuable data even removed by using shift + delete keys. * Corrupted photo revival application offers advance feature for users to preview misplaced important data before their actual restoration.

[read more]
item.description:
File Restore
(Utilities)
001Micron (Premium) – Data Recovery application facilitates users to efficiently regain overall erased valuable data stored in form of text documents, presentation files, excel spread sheets, video clippings, memorable pictures, still images, snapshots, digital photographs, favorite songs collection and many others. www.filesrestore.com enable users to regain missed data lost due to any crucial reason including formatted or reformatted hard disk drive, virus corruption, software malfunctioning and various others. Features: * File Restore program facilitates users to easily retrieve overall erased memorable image or precious data in minimum span of time from removable storage drives. * Data retrieval utility efficiently salvages entire misplaced valuable data even removed by using shift + delete keys. * Corrupted photo revival application offers advance feature for users to preview misplaced important data before their actual restoration.

[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Restore
(Utilities)
Photo reviving software works on most of windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 etc for rescuing digital games from logically affected flash memory card. For downloading snap recouping tool visit website www.filesrestore.com that is able to recover inaccessible images from formatted PDA card. Memory Card Files Restore utility regains deleted text projects from SD cards that harmed by software failure.

[read more]

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]
item.description:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

[read more]

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

item.title: Memory Card Files Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Files Restore Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filesrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Files Restore Program
(Utilities)
Best featured Memory Card Files Restore Program helps to users for recouping accidentally deleted media files like text documents, word files, excel sheets, presentations, database files, screenshots, graphics, animations etc from corrupted compact flash card easily. SDHC plus card data reviving tool provides advance option of automatic data recovery that facilitates users to recollect whole missing files from mini SD card without any effort in easiest manner.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Files Restore Program
(Utilities)
Best featured Memory Card Files Restore Program helps to users for recouping accidentally deleted media files like text documents, word files, excel sheets, presentations, database files, screenshots, graphics, animations etc from corrupted compact flash card easily. SDHC plus card data reviving tool provides advance option of automatic data recovery that facilitates users to recollect whole missing files from mini SD card without any effort in easiest manner.

[read more]

Memory Card Files Restore Program
(Utilities)
Best featured Memory Card Files Restore Program helps to users for recouping accidentally deleted media files like text documents, word files, excel sheets, presentations, database files, screenshots, graphics, animations etc from corrupted compact flash card easily. SDHC plus card data reviving tool provides advance option of automatic data recovery that facilitates users to recollect whole missing files from mini SD card without any effort in easiest manner.

[read more]

item.title: Mac Data Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Data Restore Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: usbrestoresoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Data Restore Software
(Utilities)
Are you looking to salvage your precious files from formatted pen drive? If yes, don’t go anywhere! Just click on www.usbrestore.com for getting advanced Mac Data Restore Software that helps to rescue misplaced or deleted images, documents, and media files from logically corrupted USB mass storage disk drives. Versatile Mac pen drive recovery tool provides option to restore lost data even “drive not formatted” error message displayed on computer screen while accessing the device.

[read more]
item.description:

[read more]

Versatile Mac pen drive recovery tool provides option to restore lost data even “drive not formatted” error message displayed on computer screen while accessing the device.

[read more]
